name: Italian Nut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar, salt, margarine, egg yolks, vanilla extract, and almond extract. Beat on medium speed.
2. Gradually add flour, mixing well until a smooth dough forms.
3. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls.
4. Dip each ball into egg whites, then roll in chopped pistachios.
5. Place the nut balls on a greased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Use your fingertip to make a deep indentation in the center of each nut ball.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes until firm to the touch.
8. Fill the nut balls with jelly or preserves while they are still warm.
